subcodes.first_line: The blessed leaf that hath sprouted forth from the branches of the Lote-Tree of eternity and hath grown from the boughs of the Tree of faithfulness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه مبارکه که از اغصان سدره بقا روئیده و از افنان شجره وفا انبات گشته
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love of God
